pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh validation logic
Task description and export_result.sh mount validation parameter

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task is a generative synthetic exercise requiring the creation of a new VeraCrypt encrypted container from scratch. Verified that the expected volume path ('/home/ga/Volumes/secret_archive.hc'), size (50MB), password ('SecurePass2024'), encryption algorithm ('AES'), and hash algorithm ('SHA-512') exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the task description and the evaluation logic in export_result.sh and verifier.py.
